summary.key_theme: 公司在免疫學、醫療科技與手術機器人領域取得多項臨床數據突破與 FDA 監管進展，展現強勁的研發動能與長期投資價值。

bullish.title: Johnson & Johnson investigational co-antibody therapy JNJ-4804 shows potential to raise the bar for clinical efficacy in treating refractory inflammatory bowel disease
bullish.reason: JNJ-4804 在治療難治性發炎性腸道疾病的 Phase 2b 試驗中展現卓越療效，有望成為該領域的新標竿，直接提升公司研發管線價值。

bullish.title: Johnson & Johnson study shows TREMFYA® (guselkumab) is the first and only IL-23 inhibitor to demonstrate efficacy in perianal fistulizing Crohn's disease
bullish.reason: TREMFYA 成為首個在克隆氏症相關瘻管治療中證明療效的 IL-23 抑制劑，顯著擴大該藥物的市場競爭優勢與適應症範圍。

bullish.title: Johnson & Johnson Announces Results From The First Clinical Study Of Ottava Robotic Surgical System In Roux-en-y Gastric Bypass Procedures
bullish.reason: Ottava 手術機器人系統在臨床試驗中達成安全性與效能指標，顯示公司在醫療科技領域的轉型與創新能力，有助於長期營收成長。

bullish.title: Johnson & Johnson Receives FDA Approval For STELARA To Treat Moderately To Severely Active Crohn's Disease
bullish.reason: 獲得 FDA 核准擴大 STELARA 的適應症，直接挹注營收成長動能，鞏固公司在免疫學藥物市場的領導地位。

bullish.title: Johnson & Johnson’s (JNJ) Accelerating Growth Justifies the Higher Multiple
bullish.reason: Baron Health Care Fund 指出公司成長加速，足以支撐目前較高的估值倍數，反映機構投資人對其基本面的信心。

bullish.title: How Investors May Respond To Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) New FDA Wins In Rare Disease And Schizophrenia
bullish.reason: 包含 IMAAVY 的 FDA 優先審查資格等多項里程碑，顯示公司在罕見疾病與精神醫學領域的研發實力持續兌現。

bullish.title: CAPLYTA® (lumateperone) showed greatest improvement across key efficacy outcomes among adjunctive MDD treatments in new network meta-analysis
bullish.reason: 透過網絡統合分析顯示 CAPLYTA 在憂鬱症治療上的優越性，有助於提升醫師處方意願與市場市占率。

bullish.title: Why Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) is a Top Dividend Stock for Your Portfolio
bullish.reason: 強調公司作為股息貴族的長期穩定性，吸引追求防禦性資產的投資人，提供股價下檔支撐。

neutral.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為市場關注度分析，未包含具體財務或營運變動，對股價影響中性。

neutral.title: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Johnson & Johnson Stock?
neutral.reason: 整理分析師觀點，顯示市場看法分歧或持平，未有明確的買進或賣出訊號。

neutral.title: Is Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Still Fairly Priced After Its Strong 1-Year Share Price Run?
neutral.reason: 探討股價是否過高，屬於中性的估值評估，提醒投資人注意漲多後的修正風險。

neutral.title: Final Trade: DAL, HNGE, Mag 7, JNJ
neutral.reason: 僅為財經節目盤後交易討論，未提供具體投資建議或基本面分析。
